posts.text: If @TuckerCarlson is actually arrested, the government will have crossed the Rubicon. Whatever ridiculous charges they bring up, everyone will know real reason was that he opposed the war and Israel. He'll be considered first American political prisoner within our own country.

The Voice of Hind Rajab is up for an Oscar tomorrow night in Best International Feature Film category. I challenge any supporter of Israel to watch that film and still say you're in favor of what Israel has done in Gaza and elsewhere. 

Listen to that six year old girl plead for her life and see if you can still stomach backing Israel's war crimes. 

They have the actual audio tape of her stuck in a car full of dead relatives, begging for someone to help her. The Israelis finally let an ambulanc

Israel First is not most Jewish people at all and they’re not normal supporters of Israel. They’re zealots who only care about Israel at the expense of everything else. They think if they can get people to hate Muslims, those people will help them destroy Israel’s neighbors.

Laura Loomer went to India and got called out her racist comments about Indians. But why was she there and why did she apologize for her comments about Indians? Because Israel First is moving in onto India next. They’re trying to get them to hate Muslims, like they did in the US.

You know Israel's Knesset voted two years ago to never allow a Palestinian state. Meanwhile, the liars in our media pretend the real issue is Israel's existence. In reality, it's Israel that won't let a Palestinian state exist and says that Palestinians will never have their freedom. 

We're funding a fascist state in the Middle East that is attacking all its neighbors, doing endless terrorism against civilains in the region and driving us into never ending wars.

This is all brought to you by t

Can we somehow get this to be a question asked at the national level? I can talk about it on my show, but that won’t be enough. Can we get this question to more hosts? Somehow force a debate the whole nation weighs in on. Does it have to be our troops? Why can’t Israel do it?

Why are we sending 5,000 troops to the Gulf? Israel wanted this war. Why dont they send in the ground troops? 

Why is this not even being discussed as an option? Is it just taken for granted in DC that Americans have to do Israel's dirty work or that our lives are less valuable?

Tonight on @TheYoungTurks on YouTube, we’re going to have @FmrRepMTG and @ninaturner on to discuss whether anyone in this country wants this war and the real reason why we’re in the war. Show starts at 6PM ET, as usual, they come on at 7PM.

Trump is sending in 5,000 ground troops to the Gulf. Marine expeditionary unit will be able to conduct ground operations. Several more warships and F-35s are on the way, too. I thought they said this was supposed to be easy and they weren't going to use ground troops. Here we go.

Who is fighting harder against this war - Tucker Carlson or Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries? Not close, right? It's embarrassing to have Democratic leaders outflanked on the anti-war position by some on the right. Democratic leaders are pathetic controlled opposition. Useless.

The reason is obvious. Democratic leadership also works for Israel. And they secretly love this war. That's why there isn't a peep out of them. And the so-called progressives are cowards who are afraid the media will call them antisemites and ruin their beloved careers.

The grassroots are livid about this war. Where are the Democrats? They should be shouting from the rooftops against this dumbass, calamitous war. Nowhere to be found. Where are the so-called progressives in Congress? Why aren't they all over media fighting against this war?

They took half of Gaza after their ethnic cleansing campaign. They're annexing the West Bank now. They're in western Syria. As they continue to assault on their neighbors and very literally steal their land, American media says they're the victims and we need to help them.

Meanwhile, as everyone is distracted by the war in Iran, Israel is annihialting Southern Lebanon. They have displaced a million people! They've murdered over 600 civilians. And they're planning to occupy that land and make it part of Greater Israel. The land theft continues.

I'm sure all of his progressives colleagues will come to his assistance, right? My guess is they will cower in a corner, afraid to speak out because they don't want to damage their career. Because Israeli thugs rule DC and they're afraid to stand up to them. Hope I'm wrong.

The Israel First thugs in our media have now set their sights on @RoKhanna. They found one Democrat with enough balls to take on Israel and they're furious. They're doing their ususal stupid tricks of trying smear by association & character assassination. All for beloved Israel.

Sorry, the updated number is 13 American service members killed. So, three more than I just said. And we haven't yet run out of interceptor missiles. The fact that we will is a mathematical certainty. So, what do we do with our ships when we have no missiles to defend them?
